title: These 4 DIY Builds Blow Away Valve's Steam Machine, and One Saves You $150
summary: Valve's exciting new Steam Machine gaming desktop has landed, but it's not the affordable dream machine many PC gamers expected. The Steam Machine’s default operating system is Valve’s SteamOS.
